title: aristida helicophylla
intro: Aristida helicophylla, also known as twisted grama grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae and is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The plant is said to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Aristida helicophylla can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, allowing for various forms of use in traditional medicine.
